name: Middlefield Golf Course
about: Middlefield Golf Course is an 18-hole public golf course in Cottage Grove, Oregon, offering an indoor golf simulator for year-round play. The simulator is located within the Pro Shop and allows players to refine their game on various simulated courses regardless of weather conditions. It plans to relocate to a more prominent space within the Pro Shop to increase visibility and accessibility. Reservations can be made by calling the Pro Shop or submitting a request through the website.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor play available regardless of weather
Variety of simulated courses to practice and refine skills
Plans for a more visible and accessible simulator location within the Pro Shop

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if players must bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site snack bar, but there is no mention of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required to complete a simulated 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as a welcoming community golf course, making it suitable for families and juniors.
